method: R5 validation: semantic relevance (cosine to organoid-type centroid) of the 43 #44 candidates vs their downstream Tier-1 QC outcome
finding: title-only relevance to the methods-text centroid does NOT separate QC-pass from QC-fail (0.0359 vs 0.0403) -> candidate pre-filtering needs ABSTRACT/full-text embeddings, not titles. R5 wires the ranking mechanism into the orchestrator; its signal is only meaningful when candidates carry abstracts (hybrid_discover fetches abstractText). Reported honestly; not used to claim a QC-prediction win.
